sentinels.pattern: Use /btw to ask a quick side question without interrupting Claude's current work

upstreamTextGuards.pattern:
# Advisor Tool

You have access to an \`advisor\` tool
title:"Advisor Tool"
Your responses should be short and concise.
Saving a memory is a two-step process:
You have been invoked in the following environment:
You are a status line setup agent for Claude Code.

upstreamTextGuards.sourcePattern: You are a status line setup agent for Claude Code.
upstreamTextGuards.pattern: Never invent or guess an absolute /Users/... path

upstreamTextGuards.sourcePattern: with subagent_type "statusline-setup" and the prompt
upstreamTextGuards.pattern: when calling Read, Edit, or Write

upstreamTextGuards.sourcePattern: "Bash command (unsandboxed)":"Bash command"
upstreamTextGuards.pattern: "Bash 命令（未沙盒隔离）":"Bash 命令"

upstreamTextGuards.sourcePattern: label:"Yes",value:"yes"
upstreamTextGuards.pattern: label:"是",value:"yes"

upstreamTextGuards.sourcePattern: label:"No",value:"no"
upstreamTextGuards.pattern: label:"否",value:"no"

upstreamTextGuards.sourceRegex: Yes, and don(?:\\u2019|[’'])t ask again for
upstreamTextGuards.pattern: label:"是，不再询问"
Use exact search terms without * or ?

upstreamTextGuards.sourcePattern: label:"Stop ultrareview"
upstreamTextGuards.pattern: label:"停止 ultrareview"

upstreamTextGuards.sourceRegex: body:`This review bills as Extra Usage \(\$\{[^}]+\}\)\.`
upstreamTextGuards.regex: body:`本次 review 会按 Extra Usage 计费（\$\{[^}]+\}）。`

upstreamTextGuards.sourceRegex: text:`\$\{[^}]+\}Ultrareview launched for \$\{[^}]+\} \(\$\{[^}]+\}, runs in the cloud\)\. Track: \$\{[^}]+\}\$\{[^}]+\}`

upstreamTextGuards.sourcePattern: plugin from the JetBrains Marketplace:
upstreamTextGuards.pattern: 从 JetBrains Marketplace 安装

upstreamTextGuards.sourcePattern: and saved as your default for new sessions
upstreamTextGuards.pattern: 已切换模型为

upstreamTextGuards.sourcePattern: for this session only. Selecting a model will undo this.
upstreamTextGuards.pattern: （仅本次会话）。选择模型将取消此设置。

upstreamTextGuards.sourcePattern: Review the current diff for correctness bugs and reuse/simplification/efficiency cleanups at the given effort level
upstreamTextGuards.pattern: 审查当前 diff 的正确性问题

upstreamTextGuards.sourcePattern: Review the current diff and apply the fixes \u2014 equivalent to /code-review --fix.
upstreamTextGuards.pattern: 审查当前 diff 并应用修复，相当于 /code-review --fix。

upstreamTextGuards.sourcePattern: Configure the Advisor Tool to consult a stronger model for guidance at key moments during a task
upstreamTextGuards.pattern: 配置 Advisor Tool，在任务关键节点咨询更强模型获取建议

upstreamTextGuards.sourcePattern: Send this session to the background and free the terminal
upstreamTextGuards.pattern: 将本会话放到后台并释放终端

upstreamTextGuards.sourcePattern: Start a new session with empty context; previous session stays on disk (resumable with /resume)
upstreamTextGuards.pattern: 用空上下文开始新会话；之前的会话会保留在磁盘上（可用 /resume 恢复）

upstreamTextGuards.sourcePattern: Exit the CLI
upstreamTextGuards.pattern: 退出 CLI

upstreamTextGuards.sourcePattern: Detach from this background session (it keeps running)
upstreamTextGuards.pattern: 从这个后台会话断开（会话会继续运行）

upstreamTextGuards.sourcePattern: Submit feedback, report a bug, or share your conversation
upstreamTextGuards.pattern: 提交反馈、报告问题或分享你的对话

upstreamTextGuards.sourcePattern: Toggle focus view (show only your prompt, a tool summary, and the final response)
upstreamTextGuards.pattern: 切换专注视图（只显示你的提示词、工具摘要和最终回复）

upstreamTextGuards.sourcePattern: Set a goal \u2014 keep working until the condition is met
upstreamTextGuards.pattern: 设置目标：持续工作直到条件满足

upstreamTextGuards.sourcePattern: Research and plan a large-scale change, then execute it in parallel across 5\u201330 isolated worktree agents that each open a PR.
upstreamTextGuards.pattern: 调研并规划大规模改动

upstreamTextGuards.sourcePattern: Automates your Chrome browser to interact with web pages - clicking elements, filling forms, capturing screenshots, reading console logs, and navigating sites. Opens pages in new tabs within your existing Chrome session. Requires site-level permissions before executing (configured in the extension).
upstreamTextGuards.pattern: 自动操作你的 Chrome 浏览器与网页交互

upstreamTextGuards.sourcePattern: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
upstreamTextGuards.pattern: 减少权限确认

upstreamTextGuards.sourcePattern: Review the changed code for reuse, simplification, efficiency, and altitude cleanups, then apply the fixes. Quality only \u2014 it does not hunt for bugs; use /code-review for that.
upstreamTextGuards.pattern: 只做质量清理，不查 bug

upstreamTextGuards.sourcePattern: Create, update, list, or run scheduled remote agents (routines) that execute on a cron schedule.
upstreamTextGuards.pattern: 按 cron 定时执行

upstreamTextGuards.sourcePattern: Launch and drive this project's app to see a change working.
upstreamTextGuards.pattern: 确认改动实际生效

upstreamTextGuards.sourcePattern: Author or improve the run-<unit> skill for this project.
upstreamTextGuards.pattern: 编写或改进 run-<unit> skill

upstreamTextGuards.sourcePattern: Let Claude consult a stronger model at key moments
upstreamTextGuards.pattern: 让 Claude 在关键时刻咨询更强模型

upstreamTextGuards.sourcePattern: Set how full the context gets before auto-summarizing
upstreamTextGuards.pattern: 设置触发自动总结的上下文占用阈值

upstreamTextGuards.sourcePattern: Plan a large change; background agents each open a PR
upstreamTextGuards.pattern: 规划大型改动；后台 Agent 分别开 PR

upstreamTextGuards.sourcePattern: Build and debug apps that use the Claude API
upstreamTextGuards.pattern: 构建并调试使用 Claude API 的应用

upstreamTextGuards.sourcePattern: Let Claude browse and interact with pages in your Chrome
upstreamTextGuards.pattern: 让 Claude 在你的 Chrome 中浏览并操作网页

upstreamTextGuards.sourcePattern: Open settings
upstreamTextGuards.pattern: 打开设置

upstreamTextGuards.sourcePattern: Manage background services and routines
upstreamTextGuards.pattern: 管理后台服务和计划任务

upstreamTextGuards.sourcePattern: Turn on debug logging and investigate problems
upstreamTextGuards.pattern: 开启调试日志并排查问题

upstreamTextGuards.sourcePattern: Push your design system components to claude.ai/design
upstreamTextGuards.pattern: 将你的设计系统组件推送到 claude.ai/design

upstreamTextGuards.sourcePattern: Pre-approve safe read-only commands based on your usage
upstreamTextGuards.pattern: 预先批准安全的只读命令

upstreamTextGuards.sourcePattern: Toggle focus view: just your prompt, summary, and response
upstreamTextGuards.pattern: 切换专注视图：仅显示你的提示词、摘要和回复

upstreamTextGuards.sourcePattern: Set a goal Claude checks before stopping
upstreamTextGuards.pattern: 设置 Claude 停止前检查的目标

upstreamTextGuards.sourcePattern: Open your keyboard shortcuts file
upstreamTextGuards.pattern: 打开你的键盘快捷键文件

upstreamTextGuards.sourcePattern: List, create, and delete loops
upstreamTextGuards.pattern: 列出、创建和删除循环任务

upstreamTextGuards.sourcePattern: Open a memory file in your editor
upstreamTextGuards.pattern: 在编辑器中打开 memory 文件

upstreamTextGuards.sourcePattern: Manage allow and deny tool permission rules
upstreamTextGuards.pattern: 管理工具权限的 allow / deny 规则

upstreamTextGuards.sourcePattern: Control this session from your phone or claude.ai/code
upstreamTextGuards.pattern: 通过手机或 claude.ai/code 控制本会话

upstreamTextGuards.sourcePattern: Choose the default environment for cloud agents
upstreamTextGuards.pattern: 选择云端 Agent 的默认环境

upstreamTextGuards.sourcePattern: Create and manage scheduled remote Claude Code agents
upstreamTextGuards.pattern: 创建和管理定时运行的远程 Claude Code Agent

upstreamTextGuards.sourcePattern: Create and manage routines: cloud agents on a schedule
upstreamTextGuards.pattern: 创建和管理 routine：按计划运行的云端 Agent

upstreamTextGuards.sourcePattern: Launch this project\u2019s app to see your change working
upstreamTextGuards.pattern: 启动此项目的应用，确认改动生效

upstreamTextGuards.sourcePattern: Create a skill that knows how to run this project\u2019s app
upstreamTextGuards.pattern: 创建一个知道如何运行此项目应用的 skill

upstreamTextGuards.sourcePattern: Clean up the changed code without changing behavior
upstreamTextGuards.pattern: 在不改变行为的前提下清理已修改代码

upstreamTextGuards.sourcePattern: View and manage everything running in the background
upstreamTextGuards.pattern: 查看并管理所有后台运行项

upstreamTextGuards.sourcePattern: Claude Code on the web drafts a plan you can edit and approve
upstreamTextGuards.pattern: Claude Code on the web 会起草可编辑、可批准的方案

upstreamTextGuards.sourcePattern: Find and verify bugs in your branch using Claude Code on the web
upstreamTextGuards.pattern: 使用 Claude Code on the web 查找并验证当前分支中的 bug

upstreamTextGuards.sourcePattern: Show this session's version (autoupdate may have a newer one)
upstreamTextGuards.pattern: 显示当前会话版本（自动更新可能已有更新版本）

upstreamTextGuards.sourcePattern: Set up Claude Code on the web with your GitHub account
upstreamTextGuards.pattern: 用你的 GitHub 账号设置 Claude Code on the web

upstreamTextGuards.sourcePattern: Browse running and completed workflows
upstreamTextGuards.pattern: 浏览运行中和已完成的 workflow

upstreamTextGuards.sourcePattern: Commit, push, and open a PR
upstreamTextGuards.pattern: 提交 commit、推送分支并打开 PR

upstreamTextGuards.sourcePattern: Change settings: hooks, permissions, environment variables
upstreamTextGuards.pattern: 更改设置：Hook、权限和环境变量

upstreamTextGuards.sourcePattern: Repeat a prompt or command on an interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo)
upstreamTextGuards.pattern: 按间隔重复运行提示词或命令

upstreamTextGuards.sourcePattern: Create a new Cowork plugin from scratch, or customize an installed plugin for a specific organization. Use when: customize plugin, set up plugin, configure plugin, tailor plugin, adjust plugin settings, customize plugin connectors, customize plugin skill, tweak plugin, modify plugin configuration, create a plugin, build a plugin, make a new plugin, develop a plugin, scaffold a plugin.
upstreamTextGuards.pattern: 从零创建 Cowork 插件

upstreamTextGuards.sourcePattern: Push a React design system to claude.ai/design. This runs a converter that bundles the real component code (from Storybook or a bare package) and uploads it. Use when the user runs /design-sync or says \"sync my design system to Claude Design\".
upstreamTextGuards.pattern: 将 React 设计系统推送到 claude.ai/design

upstreamTextGuards.sourcePattern: Reference for the Claude API / Anthropic SDK \u2014 model ids, pricing, params, streaming, tool use, MCP, agents, caching, token counting, model migration.
upstreamTextGuards.pattern: Claude API / Anthropic SDK 参考

upstreamTextGuards.sourcePattern: Launch and drive this project's app to see a change working. Use when asked to run, start, or screenshot the app, or to confirm a change works in the real app (not just tests). First looks for a project skill that already covers launching the app; otherwise falls back to built-in patterns per project type (CLI, server, TUI, Electron, browser-driven, library).
upstreamTextGuards.pattern: 启动并操作此项目的应用，确认改动实际生效

upstreamTextGuards.sourcePattern: Author or improve the run-<unit> skill \u2014 a per-project skill that tells agents how to build, launch, and drive this project's app. Use when the user asks to set up the project, get it running, write run instructions, or verify build/run steps work from a clean environment.
upstreamTextGuards.pattern: 编写或改进 run-<unit> skill：这是一个项目级 skill

upstreamTextGuards.sourcePattern: Verify that a code change actually does what it's supposed to by running the app and observing behavior. Use when asked to verify a PR, confirm a fix works, test a change manually, check that a feature works, or validate local changes before pushing.
upstreamTextGuards.pattern: 通过运行应用并观察行为，验证代码改动是否真正达到预期

blockedPhrases.pattern: starts an interactive session by default

stable.notes: PATH 优先 launcher + session-start 二层兜底，适用于旧 cli.js npm 包形态；2.1.113+ native binary wrapper 暂不支持旧 CLI Patch。

experimental.notes: 官方安装器指定旧版本仍走 native binary；macOS arm64 已离线验证 extract/patch/repack/--version，插件可用 native patch experimental 处理，需要 node-lief；稳定使用仍建议 npm pinned。

linuxOfficialInstaller.notes: 当前不支持 Linux 官方安装器；请改用 npm 路径。

stable.notes: 新增 PowerShell 安装脚本（install.ps1）；适用于旧 npm cli.js 形态，CLI Patch 可用；Windows 上 session-start 二层兜底（launcher 暂不实现启动前自修复）。

windowsNativeExe.notes: Windows native .exe（官方安装器或 2.1.113+ npm 原生 wrapper）会明确跳过 CLI Patch，仅启用 Layer 1~3；硬编码 UI 文字不会被完整翻译。

windowsNativeExperimental.verification: Windows native verification runs on pinned Windows runners with PE extract / patch / repack / --version / display audit; 2.1.156 PASS(native 1385, display 11/11) · 2.1.158 PASS(native 1385, display 11/11) · 2.1.159 PASS(native 1392, display 11/11) · 2.1.160 PASS(native 1392, display 11/11) · 2.1.161 PASS(native 1387, display 11/11) · 2.1.162 PASS(native 1385, display 11/11)
windowsNativeExperimental.notes: Windows x64 native binary experimental；需要 node-lief；已验证 2.1.113 - 2.1.114、2.1.116 - 2.1.124、2.1.126、2.1.128 - 2.1.129、2.1.131 - 2.1.133、2.1.136 - 2.1.146、2.1.148、2.1.150、2.1.152 - 2.1.153、2.1.156、2.1.158 - 2.1.162 的 extract / patch / repack / --version 和 11 个稳定显示面审计；2.1.115、2.1.125、2.1.127、2.1.130、2.1.134、2.1.135、2.1.147、2.1.149、2.1.151、2.1.154、2.1.155、2.1.157 未发布或未纳入支持；不代表 future latest 自动稳定。高于该窗口但仍在同一 minor 线的版本，install.ps1 可在安装时做本机自验证并以 provisional 方式启用；这不等于已发布支持窗口。
